scenarios.title: Trial-mode
scenarios.description: Determines the type of license the customer has, days remaining in trial mode, and offers to upgrade to the fully-licensed version.

controls.inner_text: Determines the type of license the customer has, days remaining in trial mode, and offers to upgrade to the fully-licensed version.

scenarios.title: In-app purchase
scenarios.description: This scenario shows any in-app products that are sellable by this product. Once one is selected from the list, a purchase can be attempted on it.

controls.inner_text: This scenario shows any in-app products that are sellable by this product. Once one is selected from the list, a purchase can be attempted on it.

scenarios.title: Unmanaged consumable product
scenarios.description: Unmanaged Consumable products require both a purchase call and a fulfillment call to report usage of consumables. Stackable purchases are not supported on Unmanaged consumables.

controls.inner_text: Unmanaged Consumable products require both a purchase call and a fulfillment call to report usage of consumables. Stackable purchases are not supported on Unmanaged consumables.

scenarios.title: Managed consumable product
scenarios.description: Managed Consumable products require both a purchase call and a fulfillment call to report usage of consumables and Microsoft Store Services will maintain the users balance. Stackable purchases are supported.

scenarios.title: User collection
scenarios.description: This scenario shows the collection of Add-On products for this product owned by the user.

controls.inner_text: This scenario shows the collection of Add-On products for this product owned by the user.

scenarios.title: App listing URI
scenarios.description: Goes to the app's listing in the Microsoft Store. You can use this information to make it easy for customers to purchase or review your app.

controls.inner_text: Goes to the app's listing in the Microsoft Store. You can use this information to make it easy for customers to purchase or review your app.

scenarios.title: Business to Business
scenarios.description: These APIs are used to retrieve secure tokens that can be saved by the application's servers to query the user's collection or grant a user access to a product.

controls.inner_text: These APIs are used to retrieve secure tokens that can be saved by the application's servers to query the user's collection or grant a user access to a product.
